title: Email item to board

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve set up a something like an IT ticket workflow using the board email address to automatically create a new item in our board. The use case is to track privacy requests that come to privacy@genericorgname.org email address, then gmail auto forwards that message to the monday board address. The problem is the sender’s email address is not included anywhere in the monday board. Does anyone know how to capture that detail so that we can actually look up the person making the request?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @MarkP !

How have you set up this integration with your gmail? Is it by using this recipe?

image1553×170 18.3 KB

If so, whenever an email is sent, it gets created on monday and will have in the update section all relevant information, including the sender.

image860×646 35.2 KB

Hope this helps!
Giannis , Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
